Compilation of Selected Major Offences by NPC started with effect from 2010. Figures are based on annual revisions and pertain to cases with known locations.
Ang Mo Kio Police Division - Punggol NPC (Number):
Ang Mo Kio Police Division - Punggol NPC started operation in 2013.  Compilation for Punggol NPC started with effect from 2013.
Ang Mo Kio Police Division - Woodleigh NPC (Number):
Ang Mo Kio Police Division - Woodleigh NPC started operation on 23 Jul 2023.  Compilation for Woodleigh NPC started with effect from 23 Jul 2023.
Bedok North and Bedok South NPC were merged in Feb 2022.
Bedok Police Division - Bedok North and Bedok South NPC were reorganised into Bedok NPC.  Compilation for Bedok NPC started with effect from Feb 2022.
Bukit Batok NPC and Bukit Panjang NPC were merged on 23 Nov 2025.
Jurong Police Division - Bukit Batok NPC (Number):
Jurong Police Division - Bukit Panjang NPC and Bukit Batok NPC merged to form Bukit Batok NPC.  Compilation for Bukit Batok NPC (after merger) started with effect from 23 Nov 2025.
Jurong Police Division - Bukit Panjang NPC (Number):
Jurong Police Division - Bukit Panjang NPC and Bukit Batok NPC merged to form Bukit Batok NPC. Compilation for Bukit Panjang NPC ceased with effect from 23 Nov 2025.
Jurong Police Division - Woodlands NPC was reorganised into Woodlands East NPC and Woodlands West NPC.  Compilation for both NPCs started with effect from 2012.
Yishun North NPC and Yishun South NPC were merged on 18 Dec 2024.
Woodlands Police Division - Yishun North NPC and South South NPC were reorganised into Yishun NPC.  Compilation for Yishun NPC started with effect from 18 Dec 2024.
Cases at Tuas Checkpoint and Woodlands Checkpoint fall under Nanyang NPC and Woodlands West NPC respectively with effect from 3 Jan 2023.
Selected major offences include murder, rape, outrage of modesty, robbery, housebreaking, theft of motor vehicle, snatch theft, rioting, serious hurt, cheating and related offences.
na   not available or not applicable
-     nil or negligible or not significant
Numbers may not add up to the totals due to rounding.
Data are the latest available at the time of access or download. Some statistics, particularly those for the most recent time periods, are provisional and may be subject to revision at a later date.
Values are shown in Singapore dollars (unless otherwise specified).
